three-code-paths.title: Three code paths
three-code-paths.lede: Compare three structurally distinct implementation approaches at equal fidelity before choosing one.

interface-directions.title: Interface directions
interface-directions.lede: Compare genuinely distinct product interface directions inside an Acta decision record.

change-blueprint.title: Change blueprint
change-blueprint.lede: Review a compact specification and a separate implementation plan through two explicit gates.

build-with-notes.title: Build with notes
build-with-notes.lede: Follow implementation progress, checks, deviations, and human STOP gates from one session record.

do-i-understand-this.title: Do I understand this?
do-i-understand-this.lede: A diagnostic understanding check grounded in the actual change; never a merge gate.

feel-the-flow.title: Feel the flow
feel-the-flow.lede: Manipulate a disposable interaction prototype and export every parameter and conclusion.

feature-xray.title: Feature X-ray
feature-xray.lede: Trace an existing feature from source evidence, operational flow, and verifiable locations.

concept-lab.title: Concept lab
concept-lab.lede: Explore a trustworthy conceptual model while keeping pedagogical simplification separate from production behavior.

what-just-happened.title: What just happened?
what-just-happened.lede: Build an evidence-backed incident record without directing active mitigation or inventing ownership.

draw-the-flow.title: Draw the flow
draw-the-flow.lede: Show an overview before stage detail, including normal, decision, failure, and recovery paths.

draw-it-in-svg.title: Draw it in SVG
draw-it-in-svg.lede: Create a figure sheet whose SVGs remain accessible and reusable outside the report.

deepen-the-codebase.title: Deepen the codebase
deepen-the-codebase.lede: Compare evidence-backed module-deepening opportunities without refactoring the repository.

find-the-cause.title: Find the cause
find-the-cause.lede: Record a tight feedback loop, falsifiable hypotheses, and a validated cause without applying the production fix.

learning-workbench.title: Learning workbench
learning-workbench.lede: Connect a durable learning mission to trusted sources, retrieval practice, and spaced review.
